chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-240 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 1154/25 3.For orders on CMA 1155/25 4.For hearing of main case 11-03-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received. On the last date of hearing, counsel for petitioners himself pointed out that for the same relief, he has approached NIRC. Counsel for the petitioners was directed to file memo of appeal whatsoever on or before the next date of hearing. Record reflects that same has not been filed. Today, neither petitioners nor their counsel is in attendance. Under the circumstances, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
